history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Black man stands in a slightly low-angle, full-body shot at a gas station at night. He is wearing a dark blue beanie with a white "DB" logo, a bright blue and black checkered long-sleeved shirt over a black t-shirt, ripped black jeans, and black and white patent leather sneakers. He has a silver chain around his neck and his hands are clasped in front of him.

The background shows a white SUV parked to the left, a Dunkin' Donuts sign illuminated in the distance, and streetlights casting a yellowish glow. The ground is a concrete or asphalt surface, typical of a gas station forecourt. The overall lighting is dim, with artificial lights creating some highlights on the car and the man's clothing. The mood is casual and urban, with a slight sense of stillness captured in the moment. There are watermarks on the right side of the image.
